product: ADOS Mission Control V2 (The Black Agency Command Deck)

inScope: Read-only brokered cockpit answering nine operational questions
Module views: agents, workflow, approvals (preview), tasks+deps, handoffs, worktrees, evidence, timeline, safety, campaigns, owner-gates, replay, evidence-diff, dead-letter, routing-incidents
GET-only APIs + SSE full-snapshot stream with reconnect
Freshness honesty, redaction (incl. high-risk allowlist), support-bundle, Basic-auth staging
Keyboard + axe a11y coverage on key views

successCriteriaMet: Owner can open Command Deck and see lease, pending approvals, blockers, and readiness without raw JSON
No mutation APIs; READ_ONLY_V2 on unsafe methods
Truthy empty/unavailable states; no fabricated SSE deltas or evidence diffs

iterations.result: keyboard.spec.ts + live-keyboard project; nav aria-label fix

autonomousLoop.nextRecommendation: Stop Phase-1 MVP work. Await explicit owner authorization before Phase 2 mutation/signing.
